query: who won the election in the brong ahafo region in 2020
response: In the Brong Ahafo Region, now known as Ahafo Region, in 2020, Nana Akufo Addo (NPP) won with 145,584 votes, accounting for 55.04% of the total votes. The runner-up was John Dramani Mahama (NDC) with 116,485 votes, accounting for 44.04% of the total votes [Election Data].
